body_txt: A type of verbal Running Gag that's not quite a catchphrase and not quite a Stock Phrase . A Plucky Comic Relief character of the more annoying Characters as Device variety (i.e., The Trickster , Devil in Plain Sight , or Tagalong Kid ) is so annoying that one or more other characters can only express their exasperation by saying their name. They use the exact same tone and inflection every time, maybe even accompanied by the same music/sound effect. The tone is so individual and memorable that some cases, if old enough, can even be parodied in future shows. The effect of this trope is amplified significantly if the character addressed is usually known by a nickname , title or other moniker that isn't their real name. Once their real first name hits the air in that administrative tone , everyone — in-universe and out — can immediately tell things just got serious . Full-Name Ultimatum (if it becomes a Running Gag ) and Say My Name could also be examples of this. Compare Say My Name .
